intro: Oreocarya crassipes, also known as Kallstroemia crassipes, is a flowering plant species in the family Zygophyllaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, exhibiting potential health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, which may contribute to its use in treating various conditions, including wounds and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Oreocarya crassipes include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic compounds, which are responsible for its therapeutic properties. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, as well as in the form of extracts and capsules, to harness its purported health benefits.
